goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be in the 'south' and should be in the 'expensive' price range.
The restaurant should serve 'chinese' food.
Make sure you get 'postcode', 'address', and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'friday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should 'leave after 08:15' and should go to 'london liverpool street'.
Make sure you get 'travel time', 'train ID', and 'arrival time'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the south and should be in the expensive price range
The restaurant should serve chinese food

You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on friday and should depart from cambridge
The train should leave after 08:15 and should go to london liverpool street
Make sure you get travel time, train ID, and arrival time
